title: eragrostis orthoclada
intro: Eragrostis orthoclada, also known as Devil's Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis orthoclada include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate skin problems, such as wounds and eczema. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis orthoclada can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
